news.headline: Real Time Networks Inc. secures ISO 27001:2022 certification for information security, asset protection, B.C, Feb. 19, 2025.
news.summary: Real Time Networks Inc. based in Port Coquitlam, British Columbia, made an announcement on February 19, 2025, that they have attained certification for the ISO/IEC 27001:2022 standard. This certification solidifies their position as a top provider of intelligent asset and key management solutions. ISO/IEC 27001:2022 is a recognized international standard for information security management systems.

news.headline: Personetics appoints Jody Bhagat as President Global Banking to align regional strategies with global vision.
news.summary: The latest update reveals that Jody Bhagat has been assigned a new role concentrating on synchronizing the company's regional strategies with its worldwide vision. As per the announcement made on February 19, 2025, by Personetics in New York, known for revolutionizing the approach of banks in creating and profiting from customer connections, this strategic move aims to align the firm's local tactics with its global objectives.

news.headline: AI company Research Solutions introduces Tables in Scite for efficient literature analysis, Feb 19, 2025, Henderson, NV.
news.summary: A recent announcement on February 19, 2025, highlighted the introduction of Tables in Scite by Research Solutions (NASDAQ: RSSS) based in Henderson, Nevada. This new capability aims to revolutionize the way research data is analyzed, providing structured insights for more efficient literature analysis. Research Solutions is known for its expertise in AI solutions catered towards researchers, with this innovation set to enhance their offerings.

news.headline: Wingstop Inc. achieves 349 net new restaurants, 15.8% unit growth, and 19.9% same store sales growth in 2024.
news.summary: In 2024, Wingstop Inc. reported the opening of a record-breaking 349 new restaurants, reflecting a 15.8% growth in units. This achievement marks their 21st consecutive year of same store sales growth, with an impressive 19.9% increase in 2024. The company's positive financial results were announced in Dallas on February 19, 2025. Wingstop's stock is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol WING.

news.headline: LG Electronics USA launches college-level digital art competition inspired by NBC's "The Americas"; winning entries to be showcased on Times Square billboard.
news.summary: A contest will be held at the college level to raise awareness about endangered species, inspired by the 10-part TV series "The Americas" on NBC. Winners will have their entries displayed on LG's Times Square billboard. LG Electronics USA issued a call for submissions on Feb. 19, 2025, in Englewood Cliffs, New Jersey.

news.headline: Newly independent Pittsburgh Paints Company appoints Brian Carson as CEO after gaining more than 30 years of experience.
news.summary: In Cranberry Township, Pennsylvania, on February 19, 2025, The Pittsburgh Paints Company (PPC) revealed the selection of Brian Carson as the new Chief Executive Officer. With over three decades of experience in the industry, Brian takes the helm of the independent company which specializes in paints and coatings. This pivotal move signifies the start of a new chapter for PPC as they aim to continue their strong presence in the sector under Brian's leadership.

news.headline: Sandbrook Capital acquires intellirent, a market leader in testing equipment for power markets, enhancing energy infrastructure.
news.summary: In Roanoke, Texas on February 19, 2025, Sandbrook Capital, a private investment firm focused on enhancing the global energy infrastructure, announced the signing of a deal to purchase intellirent. Intellirent, a prominent provider of power services in North America, will be acquired by Sandbrook as part of its commitment to developing businesses in the energy sector. The financial terms of the agreement were not disclosed.

news.headline: ZIM (NYSE: ZIM) to released Q4 and full year 2024 results on March 12, 2025, before US markets open.
news.summary: Israeli company ZIM Integrated Shipping Services Ltd. (NYSE: ZIM) is set to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on March 12, 2025, prior to the opening of the U.S. financial markets. The company will be presenting these results, with an expectation to provide insights into its annual progress.

news.headline: Ellie.ai and CData Software partner to enhance data connectivity for enterprise data teams.
news.summary: In a joint announcement on February 19, 2025, Ellie.ai and CData Software revealed a strategic partnership. Ellie.ai, the pioneering AI-assisted data modeling platform for enterprise data teams, has joined forces with CData Software, a prominent provider of data connectivity solutions. This collaboration aims to improve data processing and analysis capabilities for businesses.

news.headline: AiRANACULUS wins Defense Innovation Unit - Air Force Research Lab RF Spectrum Sharing Challenge with AI-based Radio Solution for wireless networks.
news.summary: Lowell, Massachusetts – On February 19, 2025, AiRANACULUS®, a private technology company in Massachusetts, announced the launch of its new AI-driven radio solution aimed at enhancing the efficiency of mission critical wireless networks. The solution utilizes Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) technologies to optimize network performance. With this innovation, AiRANACULUS® aims to revolutionize wireless communication by offering state-of-the-art technology capabilities, catering to the increasing demand for faster and more reliable connectivity. This advancement is expected to significantly improve network operations, providing a more seamless and robust experience for users.

news.headline: Aryaka announces winter '25 release with AI>Observe for network visibility & simplified packaging. Calif., Feb. 19, 2025.
news.summary: Aryaka®, a leading provider of Unified SASE as a Service, has announced the winter '25 release in Santa Clara, Calif., on Feb. 19, 2025. This release includes simplified packaging to enhance adoption rates and Dynamic PoPs to increase customer agility. This update aims to streamline services and empower customers with increased flexibility.

news.headline: Free 'Notes to Humanity' experience in NYC opens Feb 20, promoting self-reflection & human connection worldwide.
news.summary: A new immersive experience launching in New York City on February 20 will mark the beginning of a worldwide initiative emphasizing introspection and interpersonal bonding. This event is set to combat the increasing feelings of detachment prevalent in today's society due to excessive digital engagement.

news.headline: Brown Plus appoints Seth Nolt as IT Director, their first. Seth to lead tech operations for the firm.
news.summary: In Frederick, Maryland, on February 19, 2025, the renowned accounting and advisory company Brown Plus revealed the addition of Seth Nolt as its inaugural Information Technology (IT) Director. Nolt's appointment will involve overseeing and aiding all technological operations within the firm.

news.headline: Hallmark Venture Group's subsidiary, Jubilee Intel, exceeds $400K in Q4 2024 revenue. Substantial growth reported.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on February 19, 2025, Jubilee Intel, a branch of Hallmark Venture Group, Inc. (OTC: HLLK), disclosed their unaudited preliminary revenue for the fourth quarter of 2024, predicting revenues to surpass $400,000. This demonstrates noteworthy growth compared to previous quarters.

news.headline: Sunny Bliss Plumbing & Air acquires Flow-Tech Air Conditioning Corp in Miami, offering bigger, faster, and better services. Acquisition brings more savings, faster service, and expanded expertise for homeowners. Acquisition news released on Feb. 19, 2025.
news.summary: In a groundbreaking acquisition, Sunny Bliss Plumbing & Air has taken over Flow-Tech Air Conditioning Corp, unleashing a wave of benefits for homeowners in Miami. This move promises more savings, quicker service, and enhanced expertise in plumbing and HVAC services. The acquisition, announced on Feb. 19, 2025, is set to revolutionize the industry scene with expanded offerings. Customers can now enjoy a wider range of services under the bigger and better Sunny Bliss umbrella, ensuring top-notch plumbing and HVAC solutions across Miami. With this acquisition, residents can expect elevated standards, improved efficiency, and a seamless experience in handling their home maintenance needs.

news.headline: JPO grants Acurx Pharmaceuticals patent in Japan for DNA Polymerase IIIC inhibitors, Feb 19, 2025. NASDAQ: ACXP.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, in Staten Island, Acurx Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: ACXP) revealed its latest development. The company, focused on creating innovative small molecule antibiotics for challenging bacterial infections, shared news about a significant breakthrough.

news.headline: Paul Owen appointed as CEO-Partner of Flagship Pioneering and CEO of YourBio Health for medical device growth.
news.summary: Owen has recently been appointed to spearhead the next stage of expansion for a medical device company specialized in clinical trial, diagnostic, and reference laboratory applications in Cambridge, Massachusetts. This development was announced on February 19, 2025. Flagship Pioneering, a bioplatform innovation company, partnered with YourBio Health, a leader in remote blood services, for this endeavor.

news.headline: Elkhorn Public Schools adopts ZeroEyes AI gun detection system to enhance security; industry-leading solution deployed.
news.summary: In a recent development, an Omaha-area school district has implemented an advanced AI gun detection and situational awareness system. ZeroEyes, the company behind this cutting-edge technology, offers the sole AI-driven gun detection video analytics platform recognized by the U.S. Department of Homeland Security. This platform utilizes industry-leading AI capabilities to enhance security measures within the school district. The initiative, which was launched in partnership with ZeroEyes, provides critical real-time insights to bolster safety precautions. This integration signifies a significant step towards ensuring a safer environment for students and faculty. The innovative solution aims to fortify security by swiftly detecting potential threats. The adoption of this intelligent system underscores the school district's commitment to safeguarding its community.

news.headline: Secured Overnight Financing Rate 4.37% February 18 vs 4.33% February 14.
Elucidata appoints former CEO of Evotec and Ex-McKinsey Senior Partner to strengthen data-centric AI in healthcare.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Elucidata has recently bolstered its leadership team with the addition of a former CEO of Evotec and a former Senior Partner at McKinsey. This move is aimed at enhancing the company's strategic direction and leveraging their expertise in AI.

news.headline: Fabrice Martin named as Medallia's new Chief Product Officer.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, marking a notable decrease from the previous month. The economy also saw an increase of 250,000 jobs, with the majority of the growth occurring in the manufacturing and technology sectors. Additionally, the stock market experienced a significant rise, with the main index jumping by 500 points. These positive economic indicators have generated optimism among analysts and investors, suggesting a strong outlook for the future.

news.headline: AiDEN Auto closes $4.2M oversubscribed Seed round led by Nuri Venture Partners, bringing total funding to $6.1M.
news.summary: AiDEN Auto, a company based in San Ramon, California, has revealed the completion of its Seed funding round, raising a total of $4.2 million. This oversubscribed round has increased the company's total funding to $6.1 million. Nuri Venture Partners led the Seed Round, with participation from investors like Tengro Ventures, Band of Angels, Mentors Fund, Start Equity Ventures, Conxcity, and Weltham Capital, alongside several experienced angel investors and other family offices.

news.headline: Guidde secures $15M in Series A funding for AI video platform, totaling $30M with Qualcomm Ventures leading.
news.summary: Today, in Belmont, California, Guidde, a leader in AI-driven video documentation, revealed an increase of $15 million in its Series A funding round, resulting in a total of $30 million raised. Qualcomm Ventures took the lead in this round, joined by current investors.

news.headline: Executives optimistic on revenue, cautious on tech spending for 2025. Wipfli research shows market challenges.
news.summary: Wipfli, a leading advisory and accounting firm, based in Milwaukee, unveiled findings from its recent wealth management survey on February 19, 2025. The survey provides key insights into present market obstacles and presents strategies for long-term expansion. Participants expressed significant concerns regarding various issues, with a focus on areas impacting financial planning and investment management.

news.headline: China attracted the lowest inbound investment in four years.
Elon Musk's X in discussions to secure funding at a $44B valuation.
InstaBrain launches real-time underwriting platform powered by hr | ReFlex. PHOENIX, Feb. 18, 2025 - PRNewswire-PRWeb. # News #Insurance #Tech
news.summary: InstaBrain Inc. unveiled its advanced real-time underwriting platform on February 18, 2025. The platform, powered by hr | ReFlex from Hannover Life Reassurance Company of America, provides a data-driven solution for quick decision-making in underwriting. This new offering aims to streamline the underwriting process and improve efficiency in assessing risks. It marks a significant development in the insurance industry, offering a sophisticated tool to enhance real-time underwriting practices.

news.headline: Jeffrey A. Kahn from Greenberg Traurig LLP's Real Estate Practice in Charlotte named to 2025 North Carolina Super Lawyers 'Rising Stars' list.
news.summary: Jeffrey A. Kahn, who serves as an of counsel in the Real Estate Practice at Greenberg Traurig, LLP in Charlotte, has been recognized as one of North Carolina Super Lawyers magazine's "Rising Stars" for 2025. This prestigious accolade highlights Kahn's exceptional legal skills and expertise in the industry. The announcement was made on Feb. 18, 2025, showcasing his dedication to the field of law.

news.headline: Brad Richey appointed as new VP of Sales at Orbita, leading sales of AI-powered solutions for patient care. BOSTON, Feb. 18, 2025.
news.summary: Brad Richey has been appointed to head sales for Orbita, a company specializing in AI-powered solutions that revolutionize patient engagement and care management for health systems and specialty practices. The announcement was made in Boston on February 18, 2025. Orbita is recognized for its innovative automation solutions tailored for specialty patient care needs.

news.headline: Powercast & B&Plus partner to bring wireless power solutions to Japan, disrupting market with advanced RF tech.
news.summary: Powercast has announced a significant partnership with B&Plus to introduce its cutting-edge RF wireless power solutions to Japan, a highly competitive and advanced tech market. This collaboration aims to eradicate the need for batteries and offers innovative power solutions.

news.headline: OMRON to present AI-driven AOI tech at IPC APEX 2025 for PCB inspection, boosting SMT efficiency.
news.summary: Learn about OMRON's most recent AI innovation revolutionizing PCB inspection, enhancing efficiency in SMT manufacturing. The company, based in Hoffman Estates, Illinois, will showcase its advancements at IPC APEX 2025. OMRON Automation Americas, renowned for industrial automation solutions worldwide, is at the forefront of leveraging AI technology to optimize manufacturing processes. Don't miss this opportunity to witness their cutting-edge solutions firsthand.

news.headline: AMG chosen to manage McConnell neighborhood in Kernersville, NC. Association Management Group supports HOAs in the Carolinas.
news.summary: AMG has been selected to provide management solutions for a neighborhood in Kernersville, North Carolina. The announcement was made on February 18, 2025. AMG, known as the leading homeowner association management company in the Carolinas, will now serve as the community managers for McConnell.

news.headline: Right at Home celebrates National Caregivers Day by honoring 23,000 caregivers from Feb 16-22 across franchises nationwide.
news.summary: During the week of February 16-22, over 23,000 professional caregivers are being recognized by locally owned franchises nationwide. In Omaha, Nebraska, Right at Home is honoring these caregivers for their dedication and compassion. This initiative acknowledges the hard work of caregivers beyond just a single day.

news.headline: Luxury villa rentals are popular for Thanksgiving 2025 in destinations like Punta Cana, Turks & Caicos, etc., redefining holiday gatherings.
news.summary: With Thanksgiving 2025 on the horizon, affluent tourists are choosing private villa rentals in prime locations like Punta Cana, Casa de Campo, Turks & Caicos, Los Cabos, Tuscany, Barbados, and St. Barts, reshaping customary holiday practices. These premier villas provide ample accommodations, catering to the upscale travel market.

news.headline: Ignis H2 Energy, a geothermal developer, secures $12.5M in Series A first close funding round.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.8%. Additionally, there was an increase of 210,000 new jobs in the last month, exceeding economists' expectations. This marks a significant improvement in the labor market since the beginning of the year. The rise in employment was seen across various sectors, with notable gains in industries such as healthcare, hospitality, and retail. The strong job growth is a positive signal for the economy as it continues to recover from the impacts of the pandemic. With this promising data, experts predict further advancements in the job market in the coming months.

news.headline: Legal counsel emphasizes fair trial in Commonwealth v. Jack Lasota case (CP-23-CR-0000962-2023), stressing importance of due process.
news.summary: In the case of Commonwealth v. Jack Lasota, legal counsel is highlighting the significance of a fair trial. The defendant's attorney emphasized the essential principle of the legal system that guarantees every individual accused of a crime the right to a fair trial. The importance of this principle cannot be understated, especially in high-profile cases like this. Fairness and justice must prevail, ensuring that all parties involved have the opportunity to present their cases impartially. It is crucial to uphold this foundational aspect of our legal system to ensure that justice is served. This case has garnered significant attention, and it is imperative that the rights of the accused are protected throughout the legal proceedings.

news.headline: New PDA/ANSI Standard 03-2025 for Quality Risk Management of Aseptic Processes provides QRM method. Feb 18, 2025 - BETHESDA, Md.
news.summary: A new industry standard, PDA/ANSI 03-2025, has been established to guide Quality Risk Management (QRM) practices in aseptic processing. This standard, released in Bethesda, Md on Feb. 18, 2025, provides a detailed method for evaluating and managing contamination risks in aseptic processes. It outlines protocols for assessing and controlling risks to ensure the quality and safety of products. The initiative aims to standardize the approach to risk management in this field and improve overall operational efficiency.

news.headline: Ed Wallace of Greenberg Traurig named to 'New York City Power 100' list for 2025. Co-chairs NY office.
news.summary: Renowned attorney Edward C. Wallace, co-chair of the New York office at Greenberg Traurig LLP, has been included in City & State's prestigious "New York City Power 100" list for 2025. Notable for his contributions in the legal field, Wallace's achievement underscores his prominent position within the city. This recognition highlights his influence and impact, showcasing his standing as a key figure in New York.

news.headline: Two sisters reconcile after years of bitterness in book "My Sister's Keeper" by C. Laprie Roberts, priced $23.99 for paperback and $9.99 for e-book.
news.summary: Xulon Press is showcasing a new book by author C. Laprie Roberts, titled My Sister's Keeper, which delves into the journey of two sisters grappling with the idea of forgiveness. Set in WHEATON, Md., the story follows these women as they contemplate reconciliation. The book, priced at $23.99 for the paperback version with ISBN 9798868508509, and $9.99 for the e-book format...

news.headline: E.C. Schultek releases debut book 'The Ten' sharing stories of 10 business leaders. LENOIR, N.C., Feb. 19, 2025 - PRWeb.
news.summary: A recently published book provides a distinctive and intimate exploration of leadership by drawing insights from actual experiences. Released on February 19, 2025, in Lenoir, North Carolina, this book offers a fresh perspective on this critical subject. In a society craving genuine and influential leadership, this book stands out by offering a bold and revolutionary viewpoint, shedding light on the lasting impact of authentic leadership.

news.headline: PayPoint plc reports recent changes in ownership with significant number of shares acquired.
Memoir 'From Healing to Hell' details CIA drug experiments with 2024 eBookFairs Award. Tragic tale of William Henry Wall, Jr.'s father in BLAKELY, Ga.
news.summary: William Henry Wall, Jr. shares the heartbreaking account of his father, who became an unknowing participant in drug trials in BLAKELY, Georgia. The book "From Healing to Hell" by Wall has received recognition, including the 2024 eBookFairs Book Award and 2024 Literary Global Independent Author Award. This story sheds light on the dangers of medical experimentation and has resonated with many readers. Wall's narrative has brought attention to the issue, prompting discussions about ethics and oversight in such trials. The book's success highlights the impact of this story, with a significant number of copies sold and positive reviews received.

news.headline: Author Ed Jordan encourages putting God's love in action in his book "Doing Love! It Can Change Your Life". Paperback $16.49, e-book $7.99.
news.summary: Xulon Press introduces a book promoting the application of God's love in daily life. In GWYNN, Virginia, on February 19, 2025, Author Ed Jordan advocates for readers to enact love in practical ways through his book "Doing Love! It Can Change Your Life." The paperback edition is priced at $16.49 with ISBN 9798868511332, while the e-book version can be purchased for $7.99 with ISBN 9798868511349. Jordan emphasizes the transformative power of love...

news.headline: Engel & Völkers Florida had record-breaking 2024, attracting top talent, leading to 53% sales growth in 2025.
news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, there has been a remarkable increase of more than 53% in sales for a luxury brand. This surge in sales can be attributed to the strategic hiring of top advisors by Engel & Völkers Florida based in NAPLES. The company's performance at the end of 2024 displayed unprecedented growth, with a significant focus on acquiring skilled professionals.

news.headline: transcosmos awarded 2024 Star Enterprise Award by Shanghai Senior Citizens Foundation for supporting senior citizen welfare in China.
news.summary: transcosmos, a Tokyo-based company, has been actively involved in ESG initiatives and community welfare projects. The company recently received the 2024 Star Enterprise Award on January 13, 2025, in recognition of its efforts to support the welfare of seniors. This award highlights transcosmos' commitment to social responsibility and promoting the well-being of the elderly.

news.headline: CSS promotes Eva Markowitz to Chief Human Resources and Compliance Officer after 3 years of strategic talent development.
news.summary: A prominent player in IT modernization has promoted their former Senior Vice President to enhance their workforce strategy and compliance in Reston, Virginia. The promotion comes after three years of achievements in revamping talent development and acquisition, as well as implementing data and security solutions within the IT sector.

news.headline: MyPerfectResume finds 15 high-paying, low-stress remote jobs for 2025, based on BLS data. Trends show increased demand.
news.summary: Analysis of data from the Bureau of Labor Statistics shows a growing interest in remote job opportunities that provide financial security, flexibility, and work-life balance. In a recent study conducted in Guaynabo, Puerto Rico, on February 19, 2025, a career website revealed a surge in the popularity of low-stress remote positions. Professionals are increasingly drawn to roles that offer stability and the ability to work from anywhere, reflecting the evolving job market landscape. This trend indicates a shift towards prioritizing personal well-being in the workforce.

news.headline: ClearBlade appoints John Jenkins as VP of Sales in Austin, Texas. The provider offers Edge AI, IoT, and connected digital twins software with fast ROI.
news.summary: An experienced professional in the industry will utilize their knowledge in AI and enterprise services to fuel strategic expansion efforts. Located in Austin, Texas, ClearBlade is a top provider of Edge AI, IoT, and connected digital twins software, known for delivering the quickest return on investment. The announcement was made on February 19, 2025 through PRNewswire-PRWeb.

news.headline: Barrick Gold files reports for Reko Diq and Lumwana projects per NI 43-101 standards on Feb 19, 2025.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, in Toronto, it was reported that Barrick Gold Corporation disclosed the submission of technical reports related to the Reko Diq Project and the Lumwana Expansion Project. These reports were filed in compliance with National Instrument 43-101, which sets standards for disclosing information on mineral projects. Barrick Gold Corporation is listed as NYSE:GOLD and TSX:ABX.

news.headline: Incent receives investment from Tyfone to boost youth digital banking solutions, expand capabilities, and empower next generation.
news.summary: A partnership between Incent, LLC and digital banking solutions provider Tyfone aims to enhance youth digital banking services for financial institutions. The collaboration seeks to strengthen financial education tools for banks and credit unions. This move is part of a joint effort to support the younger generation in developing responsible money management skills. The investment signifies a dedication to empowering future account holders.
